title: cherri's Minesweeper
description: Fully functional, customizable, multi-dimensional Minesweeper in Minecraft.
body:
### My favourite puzzle game meets my favourite sandbox game.
---
![most blocks in cherri's Minesweeper being shown with the subtitle "everything Minesweeper, and way too much more."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8455be8a93b5c79f1ad2d84c81f4fd9b02496d9.png)

- **2D + 3D [Minesweeper](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Minesweeper_(video_game)) support**
- Board Builder (Presets, gameplay options and custom sizes)
- Colored flags
- Conditional and "fun" mines
- Customization via gamerules
- Double mines
- Face (and face masks!)
- **INFINITE BOARDS**
- [MINESCREEPER](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_15w14a)/dirt tiles
- **Negative mines**
- Seven-segment number displays
- Stone tiles

_**Note: Mine chance is dependent on [world difficulty](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Difficulty#World_settings) for now**_

_**This is a Creative mode-oriented mod. If you haven't figured it out already, this mod can destroy your world... big time. Be careful!**_

---
Non-retro flag models/textures and pt_br translations were made by TriaBledig! Go check 'em out! ([Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/triabledig), [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/triabledig.bsky.social))

Some content is inspired by Mined-Out, Robot Sweeper 64, The Minefields and other media.

If you want to know more or have something to report, view the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/CXKyBARASH) or [Wiki](https://sites.google.com/view/cherritrg/cherris-minesweeper) in the Links section!

###### Not affiliated with Microsoft in any way, thank goodness.
